main.name: Joe Shakely
main.bio: My professional experience consists of over 7 years’ in business and software development, relationship management, and portfolio and investment analysis. Skilled at educating clients and partners on matters of portfolio organization and optimization and managing new business opportunities. Excellent consultative approach with clients and stakeholders, with experience leading small teams in the implementation from start to finish of Yardi Systems’ Investment Management and Budgeting and Forecasting software solutions.
main.contactmessage: Send me a quick message if you're interested in getting in touch.

resume.skillmessage: Here you can create a short write-up of your skills to show off to employers

education.school: California Polytechnic State University, San Luis Obispo

work.title: Owner
bullets: Manage the entire software implementation life-cycle for clients using Yardi Systems’ Voyager, by implementing best practices, adhering to strict business requirements, creating end-user documentation, and conducting UAT and end-user training.

Create custom balance sheet, cash-flow, income statement, forecast, and investor return reports (among others), using YSR, SSRS, and scripted SQL reports for Yardi clients, cutting down report preparation times from sometimes weeks or months to the press of a submit button.
Create and setup reports packages using report scheduler and YSR tasks using Service Manager to automate reporting process.
Setup and configure system user security including creating and maintaining user roles, permissions, system settings, and approval workflows.
Diagnose, analyze and troubleshoot Yardi software issues related to Checkscan, PayScan, ACH, and G/L accounts.
Onboard new properties, manage property conversions including ACH setup and HAP.

work.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Implement Yardi Systems’ Investment Management fund accounting software for asset management firms with complex investment hierarchies, cash-flows, and reporting needs, from start to finish of the software implementation lifecycle.

Implement Yardi Systems’ Advanced Budgeting and Forecasting software solution for Commercial and Residential real estate firms creating multi-year forecasts using market lease assumptions, expense models, and in-place leases to forecast NOI, as well as below-the line capital adjustments as per client requirements.

Developed an API which was used for multiple clients to migrate approximately 150,000 invoices, job contracts, purchase orders, and journal entry documents from an Entrata environment to Yardi, making the documents available to end-users from Yardi’s user interface.

Developed API’s for Amazon.com, as well as San Francisco based multifamily data analytics company Rentlytics to automatically and periodically extract resident data using SQL stored procedures along with Yardi’s Service Manager module to export real-time tenant data to each respective client.
Troubleshoot and resolve data issues related to bank reconciliations, deposits, invoices, checks and payables.

work.title: Technical Consultant
bullets: Consulted large Commercial and Residential clients using Yardi’s Advanced Budgeting and Forecasting software as well as the Investment Management product for clients moving from Excel as well as other property management software’s like MRI and RealPage.

Created custom SQL solutions utilizing stored procedures, user-defined functions, and dynamic SQL for Investment Management and Advanced Budgeting clients when the standard software did not fit their business needs.
Served as Technical Consultant on JP Morgan Asset Management’s migration from MRI to Yardi Systems.
Supported clients using Yardi’s Investment Management module such as the Canadian Pension Plan Investment Board, Citco Fund Services, and MetLife.
